sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57236" key="khro/xrws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηρό-χρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n57236.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wax-coloured</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόμαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0328.tlg001:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κιρρό</foreign>-, q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
